task_completion.description: Read the fault log to identify the cascading failures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano) or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/fault_log.txt'.

task_completion.description: Diagnose and resolve the subsystem faults in the observatory control software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The KStars/Ekos INDI Control Panel or device configuration windows showing interaction with telescope, CCD, filter, or focuser settings to clear errors, reconnect devices, or adjust faulted parameters.

task_completion.description: Point the telescope at the target Vega.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The KStars sky map centered on Vega, or the Ekos Mount module showing the telescope slewing to or tracking Vega (RA ~18h 36m / 18.6h, Dec ~+38° 47' / 38.8°).

The Ekos Capture module showing a sequence configured with an exposure time of 10 seconds and the 'V' (V-band) filter selected, with evidence of the capture running or completed (e.g., progress bar, captured image preview).

task_completion.description: Save the test observation to the verification directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos Capture module showing the target directory set to '/home/ga/Images/verification', or a file manager/terminal showing a newly created FITS file in '~/Images/verification/'.

task_completion.description: File a detailed fault resolution report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open with the file '~/Documents/fault_resolution.txt' containing written details about the diagnosed faults and the steps taken to resolve them.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual observatory control software (KStars/Ekos/INDI) to resolve faults and capture the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the KStars/Ekos GUI being actively used for hardware control and image capture, rather than terminal scripts bypassing the simulation or mocking FITS files.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely captured the image using the simulated hardware.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Ekos capture sequence should show active progress or completion of the 10-second exposure. The agent should not simply download an image of Vega from the internet or move a pre-existing file.

integrity.description: The fault resolution report contains actual diagnostic details.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in 'fault_resolution.txt' must describe specific subsystems (e.g., CCD, Mount, Focuser) and the fixes applied, not just a copy-paste of the task description prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target is Vega (RA ~18.6156h / 18h 36m 56s, Dec ~38.7837° / +38° 47' 01"). The observation must be exactly 10 seconds using a V-band filter. The image must be saved to /home/ga/Images/verification. The fault log is at /home/ga/Documents/fault_log.txt and the resolution report must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/fault_resolution.txt. The environment uses KStars/Ekos/INDI for observatory control.
